title: jbx.json descriptor
description: Descriptor for jbx publish/install metadata. It names the main Java source, Maven coordinates, dependencies, source files, repositories, and Maven Central metadata.

$schema.description: Optional editor/schema hint. Use https://jbx.telegraphic.dev/schemas/jbx-json/v1.json. jbx ignores unknown fields, so this is safe to include.

main.description: Main Java source. Relative paths resolve from the descriptor directory. Existing paths win; otherwise jbx also checks .java/.jsh/.jav extensions and Java FQN matches under the descriptor directory.

group.description: Maven groupId, for example dev.telegraphic.demo. Required for publish/install unless supplied by //GAV.

id.description: Maven artifactId, for example hello-tool. Required for publish/install unless supplied by //GAV.

version.description: Artifact version. Maven Central publishing rejects -SNAPSHOT versions.

package.description: Java package override used when staging compact/unpackaged sources for publishing.

name.description: Human-readable artifact name for generated POM metadata. Defaults to group:id.

description.description: Artifact description for generated POM metadata. Falls back to //DESCRIPTION or a generated description.

url.description: Project URL for Maven metadata. Required for Maven Central dry-run/publish.

licenses.description: Project licenses for Maven metadata. Required for Maven Central dry-run/publish.

developers.description: Developer metadata for generated POM metadata. Required for Maven Central dry-run/publish.

scm.description: Source-control metadata for generated POM metadata. Required for Maven Central dry-run/publish.

java.description: Requested Java version, equivalent to //JAVA when descriptor metadata is used.

dependencies.description: Compile-time/public dependencies as Maven coordinates. Equivalent to //DEPS. Rendered as normal Maven dependencies.

runtimeDependencies.description: Runtime-only dependencies as Maven coordinates. Equivalent to //RUNTIME. Rendered with Maven runtime scope and not needed on the compile classpath.

sources.description: Additional source files to include in the published artifact. Omit this field to let jbx auto-discover local Java sources; set it explicitly to control the source list.

repositories.description: Additional Maven repositories for dependency resolution. Entries may be bare URLs or id=url values.
